description: Product Description Cute & cuddly supersoft plush Dinosaurs from Suki Gifts famous Dinoz collection. Purple soft boa Brontosaurus dinosaur with contrasting yellow spots. Approximately 16cm long. Suitable for all ages. Other sizes in different colours and styles also available in the Dinoz range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1 x Brontosaurus Dino Sml See more
